name: Tripe
recipeInstructions:
1. Parboil the tripe for about 1 hour until cool enough to handle.
2. Cut into strips measuring approximately 1" by 3".
3. Sauté onion in butter and olive oil until golden.
4. Add the remaining ingredients and mix well.
5. Simmer for 1 1/2 to 2 hours, or until tender.
6. If needed, add a bit more water at the end to create a sauce for soaking up with crusty bread.
7. Serve hot with grated cheese on the side.
8. Variation: For a pasta sauce, cut the tripe smaller and add about 4 more ounces of tomato sauce and 1/2 cup of dry wine (white or red). Adjust salt and pepper accordingly.
